output.title: Security Deposit Demand Letter: Recover Your Deposit in Days, Not Months
output.meta_description: Get your security deposit back fast with a legally sound demand letter. State-specific templates and automated delivery for US renters. Start free.
content_outline: The Real Reason 30% of Landlords Keep Security Deposits Past the Deadline
Do You Actually Need a Demand Letter for Your Security Deposit?
State-by-State Deadlines and Legal Requirements Explained
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Gets Results
From Template to Mailbox: Sending Your Letter in Under 5 Minutes
What to Do If Your Landlord Still Won't Return Your Security Deposit
key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14 to 60 days or provide an itemized deduction list
A professionally formatted demand letter is legally required in many states before filing a small claims lawsuit
State-specific security deposit demand letter templates dramatically increase response rates from landlords
Certified mail with return receipt creates court-admissible proof that your landlord was formally notified
DepositBack generates properly cited demand letters tailored to your state laws and move-out situation
output.cta: Generate Your State-Specific Security Deposit Demand Letter — It's Free
output.target_audience: US renters who have moved out within the last 6 months and have not received their full security deposit refund, or who received unfair deductions without proper documentation
